title: horkelia cuneata subsp. sericea
intro: Horkelia cuneata subsp. sericea, also known as silky horkelia, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of silky horkelia include its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Silky horkelia can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and proper preparations.
